AssistedSearchApiKey.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM-assisted search

AssistedSearchModel.description: OpenRouter model to use for search

AssistedSearchMaxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent assisted searches

AssistedSearchGistFile.description: Path to wiki gist file included in LLM prompts. Set to false to disable.

AssistedSearchFeedbackFile.description: Path to JSONL file for logging search feedback (article result frequency).

AssistedSearchMinArticleLength.description: Minimum page length in bytes to include in gist file.

AssistedSearchGistMaxSize.description: Maximum total size in bytes for the articles section of the gist file.
